title: GPU svd / qr drop host bounces
description:
Spun out from #632 partial close (solve + cholesky landed). svd and qr are trickier:

- svd has 3 outputs (U, S, Vt) requiring 3 device buffers + transpose dance
- qr needs Householder reflector unpacking via cusolverDnSorgqr to get Q; R is just the upper triangle of the factored buffer

Both use cuSOLVER ops that already exist in cusolver.rs but with &[T] / Vec<T> signatures; need to refactor to &CudaBuffer<T> / CudaBuffer<T>.
